## What this project is

Project Origins: a persistent ecosystem simulation where players guide life evolution through species creation and environmental stewardship. MVP is a deterministic, local-first evolution sandbox validating player attachment and emergent adaptation.

## Lanes

| Lane        | Purpose                          | Now    |
|-------------|----------------------------------|--------|
| simulation  | Core evolution engine            | **ACTIVE** — #6 in agent-review (karen to verify), #7 (traits) in agent-todo |
| frontend    | React UI, visualization, controls| **ACTIVE** — #19 (Zustand store) in agent-todo |
| integration | Engine ↔ UI wiring, runner       | blocked — waiting on #13 + #19 |
| demo world  | Starter scenario (barely stable) | blocked — waiting on #14 + #25 |
| tests       | Unit, integration, snapshot tests | blocked — #15–17 in backlog behind engine |

## Client decisions (all answered — #18 CLOSED)

| Q | Decision |
|---|----------|
| Q1 State mgmt | **Zustand** + separate event log for lineage/replay |
| Q2 Visualization | **Canvas 2D** for MVP |
| Q3 Energy budget | All defaults **approved** except solar: **radial dissipation from grid center** (peak=10 at center, ~3 at corners) + **God Mode control panel** for runtime adjustment of all constants |
| Q4 First-play world | **Pre-built barely-sustainable ecosystem** spanning full ecological spectrum — will collapse ~100–200 ticks without player intervention |
